text: Here, surrounded by glass walls, silent chairs, and the hum of screens, I feel a quiet anticipation. Knowledge and innovation seem to hover in the air; yet there is a division between the inward, anxious preparation of the meeting room, and the outward, colorful invitation of the research display. I am drawn in two directions: one toward clarity and purpose, the other toward ambiguity and open-ended inquiry. It is invigorating, and a little uncertain—a balance of possibility and unease.
